testcase.name: broadcastToAll_anonymous_returnsClientError

testcase.name: sendToUsers_anonymous_returnsClientError
testcase.system-out:
&amp#27;[2m2026-03-30T08:12:43.455+02:00&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[31mERROR&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[35m65648&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[2m---&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[2m[online-school] [ main]&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[2m&amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36mc.m.o.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler &amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[2m:&amp#27;[0;39m Internal server error: Cannot invoke "java.security.Principal.getName()" because "principal" is null
